lucidBlocksBeginnerGuide.title: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Overview
lucidBlocksBeginnerGuide.intro: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt is a limited-time PvE event mode inside Marvel Rivals, not a standalone game. This overview explains how the mode plays, why the Dracula storyline matters, and what players should focus on first.

steps.title: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Is an Event Mode
steps.description: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt runs inside the core game client as an event playlist tied to Season 7.5 and the Dracula invasion storyline.

steps.title: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Supports Solo and Co-op
steps.description: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt can be played solo or in a 1-4 player squad, with duplicate hero picks enabled for flexible team setups.

steps.title: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Uses a PvE Wave Loop
steps.description: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt centers on wave clears, short upgrade windows, Arcana spending, and boss checkpoints instead of standard PvP rounds.

steps.title: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Features Six Event Heroes
steps.description: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt hero pool includes Blade, Jeff the Land Shark, Moon Knight, The Punisher, Squirrel Girl, and Thor.

steps.title: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Boss Route Scales by Difficulty
steps.description: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt introduces more boss pressure as difficulty rises, culminating in Dracula progression and hidden Kingpin objectives.

quickTips: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt first clears unlock the fastest reward momentum.
Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt runs become smoother when Arcana upgrades are chosen around team roles.
Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt hero-specific goals at Nightmare 40 and 70 are key long-term milestones.
Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt accessory shards are easiest to optimize when combined with milestone pushes.

lucidBlocksApotheosisCrafting.title: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Release Date
lucidBlocksApotheosisCrafting.intro: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt launched on April 23, 2026 at 09:00 UTC and is scheduled to end on July 30, 2026 at 09:00 UTC. Use this date panel to plan clears before the event closes.

cards.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Announcement
cards.description: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt was announced in the official Version 20260423 patch notes published on April 22, 2026.

cards.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Launch Time
cards.description: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt became playable on April 23, 2026 at 09:00 UTC with the Season 7.5 event rollout.

cards.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Active Window
cards.description: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt remains active from April 23, 2026 to July 30, 2026 as a limited-time PvE mode.

cards.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt End Date
cards.description: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt event access closes on July 30, 2026 at 09:00 UTC, so milestone routes should be completed before then.

cards.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Time-Zone Planning
cards.description: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt deadlines are announced in UTC, so convert event cutoffs to local time for squad scheduling.

cards.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Deadline Priority
cards.description: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt high-value targets include first clears, Nightmare milestone rewards, and Kingpin accessory shard progress.

milestones: Before deadline: Finish Nightmare and shard goals

lucidBlocksToolsAndWeapons.title: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Beginner Guide
lucidBlocksToolsAndWeapons.intro: Use this first-run route to enter Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt, pick a hero, and build momentum from Normal through Nightmare progression.

items.name: Open Playlist and Enter Rivalry
items.description: From the Marvel Rivals main menu, open Playlist, switch to the Rivalry tab, and select the Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt icon.

items.name: Choose a Difficulty for Your First Run
items.description: Start Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt on Normal to learn wave pace and boss timing before moving into Hard and Extreme clears.

items.name: Pick One of Six Event Heroes
items.description: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt allows duplicate hero picks, so squads can optimize damage, wave control, or survivability.

items.name: Set Gear Slots Before Queueing
items.description: Review weapon, armor, accessory, and exclusive slots so Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt runs start with a stable build baseline.

items.name: Spend Trait Points Between Runs
items.description: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt scaling improves quickly when trait points are allocated to core damage, defense, and utility needs.

items.name: Use Arcana for Mid-Run Scaling
items.description: In Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt, Arcana choices during runs decide wave stability and boss damage breakpoints.

items.name: Recycle Drops in the Forge
items.description: Convert unwanted drops into Uru Shards so Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt build upgrades stay focused on your main hero route.

items.name: Push Clear Chain: Normal to Nightmare
items.description: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt progress is strongest when each clear unlocks the next difficulty and milestone reward track.

lucidBlocksStorageAndInventory.title: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Rewards
lucidBlocksStorageAndInventory.intro: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt rewards are split across first clears, Nightmare milestones, hero-specific challenges, enemy count tracks, and Kingpin shard crafting.

solutions.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt First-Clear Rewards
solutions.description: Normal, Hard, and Extreme first clears grant Units, Unstable Molecules, and gallery cards that establish early progression value.

solutions.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Nightmare Milestones
solutions.description: Nightmare checkpoints reward moods, currencies, titles, and repeated Kingpin Trophy Shards across higher tiers.

solutions.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Hero Challenges
solutions.description: Each event hero receives specific Nightmare 40 and Nightmare 70 goals tied to unique emoji and title rewards.

solutions.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Enemy Count Rewards
solutions.description: Defeating enemy totals unlocks gallery cards, currencies, spray cosmetics, and the Blood Hunt nameplate.

solutions.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Kingpin Trophy Shards
solutions.description: Shard drops from high Nightmare milestones are required for crafting the Kingpin Dethroned Trophy accessory.

solutions.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Hidden Boss Bonus
solutions.description: Defeating hidden Kingpin routes unlocks special accessory rewards and additional cosmetic progression.

managementTips: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt first-clear rewards should be completed before deep Nightmare attempts.
Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt shard planning is easiest when Nightmare checkpoints are tracked in order.
Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt hero challenge titles should be paired with your most stable hero build.
Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt enemy-count rewards progress naturally during regular farming sessions.

lucidBlocksQualiaAndBaseBuilding.title: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Kingpin Hidden Boss
lucidBlocksQualiaAndBaseBuilding.intro: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Kingpin is a hidden Phase 14 boss unlocked only when all 3 Golden Keys are completed in one Extreme run before defeating Dracula.

cards.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Step 1: Start on Extreme Difficulty
cards.description: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Kingpin route only appears on Extreme, so plan key objectives before Phase 13 instead of treating the run like a normal clear.

cards.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Step 2: Phase 4 Arcane Barrier (90s)
cards.description: Sprint to the bridge barrier, break it fast, and enter the checkpoint to secure Golden Key 1 before the 90-second timer expires.

cards.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Step 3: Phase 7 Bloodclot Buds
cards.description: Clear Ruins bloodclot buds for Golden Key 2, with scaling counts by team size: Solo 1, Duo 2, Full squad 4.

cards.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Step 4: Phase 12 Sealing Circle (120s)
cards.description: Destroy blood crystals around the Castle Entrance within 120 seconds to secure Golden Key 3 and keep the hidden route active.

cards.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Step 5: Defeat Dracula to Enter Times Square
cards.description: After all Golden Keys are secured, beating Dracula transitions the run to the Phase 14 Times Square Kingpin encounter.

cards.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Step 6: Kingpin Attack Counters
cards.description: Counter Trance Beam with movement spam and burst, hide from Charged Implosion, sidestep Aerial Slam, and kite Charge Attack at range.

highlights: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt missing any Golden Key ends the route after Dracula
Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Phase 4 and Phase 12 timed checks are the two hardest failures
Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt teams should call objective spawns immediately to prevent time loss
Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Kingpin clear completes hidden objective progression and reward unlocks

lucidBlocksWorldRegions.title: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Dracula Boss Guide
lucidBlocksWorldRegions.intro: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Dracula has four phases built around Bloodstain healing, movement checks, and a final sunlight-powered burst window.

regions.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Dracula Phase 1
regions.description: Avoid feeding Bloodstain stacks, then interrupt Dracula's siphon channel with team burst to trigger a short stun and safe damage window.

regions.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Dracula Phase 2
regions.description: When Dracula enters blood mist, targeted players must keep moving so the grab misses and opens another punish window.

regions.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Dracula Phase 3
regions.description: Track sweeping sword lanes, destroy sentient swords, and preserve revival tools instead of forcing risky damage.

regions.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Dracula Phase 4
regions.description: Break both crystals to open the sunlight zone, gain Empowered, then burst Dracula during vulnerability windows.

regions.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Dracula Core Rules
regions.description: Treat Phases 1-3 as survival setup, play mostly at range, and reserve strongest cooldowns for the Phase 4 sunlight sequence.

lucidBlocksCreaturesAndEnemies.title: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Best Characters
lucidBlocksCreaturesAndEnemies.intro: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt best picks are heroes that control swarms and still deliver boss pressure without relying on perfect team coordination.

creatures.name: Squirrel Girl
creatures.description: Squirrel Girl is a top Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt investment with strong mobility, ranged pressure, and reliable scaling for solo or co-op clears.

creatures.name: Moon Knight
creatures.description: Moon Knight's Phases of the Moon Ankh build gives Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt teams high boss damage, crowd control, and strong reposition tools.

creatures.name: Jeff the Land Shark
creatures.description: Jeff the Land Shark scales hard in Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt once Overflowing Waters and Forked Stream are online for boss burst and wave coverage.

creatures.name: Thor
creatures.description: Thor provides Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt squads with durable frontline stability and reliable damage during revive-heavy runs.

creatures.name: Blade
creatures.description: Blade performs in Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt when built around safer gun-focused pressure, but needs investment and team support at high tiers.

creatures.name: The Punisher
creatures.description: The Punisher adds strong single-target damage in Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt but depends on teammates to handle heavy swarm control.

lucidBlocksMobilityGear.title: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Builds
lucidBlocksMobilityGear.intro: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt builds are defined by Traits, Arcana timing, and four gear slots: Weapon, Armor, Accessory, and Exclusive.

items.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Squirrel Girl Ranged Mobility Carry
items.description: Prioritize ranged damage and mobility so Squirrel Girl can kite safely, clear swarms, and still contribute meaningful boss pressure.

items.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Moon Knight Phases of the Moon Build
items.description: Focus on Ankh uptime, ranged weapon scaling, and survivability gear to maximize Moon Knight's endgame boss and wave control value.

items.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Jeff Overflowing Waters Build
items.description: Rush Overflowing Waters and Forked Stream support so Jeff can transition from slower early waves into high-damage boss shredding.

items.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Thor Survival Anchor Build
items.description: Stack durability with steady damage to keep Thor alive during wipe-prone phases and preserve co-op run stability.

items.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Blade Gun-Focused Ranged Build
items.description: Lean into gun-focused traits and sustained ranged pressure because close-range Blade trading is punished heavily in late boss phases.

items.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Punisher Single-Target Boss Build
items.description: Build single-target damage and uptime for bosses, while relying on teammates to cover wave control and survival space.

unlockMilestones: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt setup should lock all four gear slots before pushing deep Nightmare
Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt high tiers reward ranged pressure and survivability over melee greed
Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Arcana spending should align with boss checkpoints and danger waves
Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt progression is stronger with one wave-focused and one boss-focused loadout per hero

lucidBlocksFarmingAndGrowth.title: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Nightmare Guide
lucidBlocksFarmingAndGrowth.intro: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Nightmare progression rewards disciplined pacing. Use this route to scale from first Nightmare clears to deep milestone targets.

sections.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Nightmare Unlock Path
sections.description: Clear Normal, Hard, and Extreme in sequence so Nightmare opens with enough baseline gear and trait investment.

sections.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Nightmare 5-30 Route
sections.description: Early Nightmare milestones focus on currencies and mood rewards; prioritize clean clears over risky speed runs.

sections.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Nightmare 40-70 Route
sections.description: This range is critical for hero challenge emojis and titles, so align hero picks with your most consistent builds.

sections.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Nightmare 80-120 Route
sections.description: Late milestones emphasize shard and title completion; optimize revive timing and boss burst execution.

lucidBlocksBestEarlyUnlocks.title: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Difficulty Levels
lucidBlocksBestEarlyUnlocks.intro: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt difficulty ladder moves from onboarding clears to high-pressure endurance. Use this comparison to choose the next efficient tier.

priorities.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Normal
priorities.description: Best tier for first-run learning, route familiarity, and initial reward unlocks before scaling upward.

priorities.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Hard
priorities.description: Introduces stronger wave pressure and requires cleaner role execution while still remaining highly farmable.

priorities.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Extreme
priorities.description: Prepares teams for Nightmare mechanics and includes hidden boss progress routes tied to top-value rewards.

priorities.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Nightmare
priorities.description: Primary endgame track with repeated milestone currencies, title rewards, and shard progression.

priorities.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Tier Transition Rules
priorities.description: Advance one tier at a time after securing stable clears and gear improvements to avoid progression stalls.

priorities.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Recommended Progression Order
priorities.description: Use the sequence Normal, Hard, Extreme, then Nightmare to keep both rewards and build scaling aligned.

lucidBlocksAchievementTracker.intro: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt gear growth is built around slot management, rarity upgrades, and forge conversion efficiency.

lucidBlocksSingleplayerAndPlatformFAQ.title: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Traits and Arcana
lucidBlocksSingleplayerAndPlatformFAQ.intro: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt progression depends on smart trait allocation and Arcana timing. These answers cover the most common build decisions.

faqs.question: How do Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Traits improve a hero?
faqs.answer: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Traits act as hero-specific progression branches that increase role power, survivability, and consistency.

faqs.question: How do Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Arcana points work?
faqs.answer: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Arcana points are spent during runs to gain immediate stat and utility upgrades for the current session.

faqs.question: What is the best Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt trait priority for beginners?
faqs.answer: In Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt, beginners should prioritize baseline survivability first, then add reliable damage scaling for stable clears.

faqs.question: When should Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt players spend Arcana aggressively?
faqs.answer: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Arcana should be invested before high-pressure waves and boss checkpoints where failure risk is highest.

faqs.question: How do Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Traits and Arcana combine for Nightmare?
faqs.answer: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Nightmare success comes from permanent trait planning plus run-by-run Arcana adaptation to enemy pressure.

faqs.question: Can Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Arcana choices support co-op roles?
faqs.answer: Yes, Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Arcana can be tuned for frontline control, wave clear support, or boss burst specialization.

lucidBlocksSteamDeckAndController.title: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Bosses Guide
lucidBlocksSteamDeckAndController.intro: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt includes multiple major bosses with different pressure profiles. Use this quick FAQ to prepare each encounter.

faqs.question: Which bosses appear in Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt?
faqs.answer: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt features Capwolf, Ratatoskr, Dracula, and hidden Kingpin routes across increasing difficulty tiers.

faqs.question: How does Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt boss order change by difficulty?
faqs.answer: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt introduces more boss complexity at higher tiers, with Nightmare requiring tighter execution and pacing.

faqs.question: What is the core strategy for Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt boss phases?
faqs.answer: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt boss consistency comes from add control, cooldown staggering, and keeping revive opportunities safe.

faqs.question: Why is Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Kingpin considered high value?
faqs.answer: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Kingpin route is tied to hidden objectives and accessory progression, making it a priority target.

faqs.question: How should teams prepare for Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Dracula?
faqs.answer: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Dracula preparation should include role assignments, burst windows, and defensive fallback planning.

lucidBlocksSettingsAndAccessibility.title: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Enemies and Waves
lucidBlocksSettingsAndAccessibility.intro: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt wave control depends on recognizing enemy classes and reacting before pressure spikes overwhelm the team.

settings.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Basic Vampire Units
settings.description: Basic mobs create constant chip pressure and should be cleared quickly to protect damage windows on elite targets.

settings.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Elite Enemies
settings.description: Elite enemies introduce major disruption and should be focus-fired immediately to stabilize the wave rhythm.

settings.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Ranged Threats
settings.description: Ranged units punish poor positioning, so squads should maintain line-of-sight control and quick engage rotations.

settings.name: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Objective Waves
settings.description: Objective waves demand split attention between enemy clear and task completion, making communication the key win condition.

lucidBlocksUpdatesAndPatchNotes.title: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Solo and Co-op Tips
lucidBlocksUpdatesAndPatchNotes.intro: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt can be cleared solo or in full squads. These timeline-style tips show how strategy should shift with team size.

entries.title: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Solo Entry Route
entries.description: Use safe hero picks, conservative Arcana spending, and steady wave pacing to maintain consistent solo clears.

entries.title: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Duo and Trio Scaling
entries.description: Smaller teams should split responsibilities clearly so wave control and boss burst remain balanced.

entries.title: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Full Squad Role Split
entries.description: In 4-player runs, assign clear frontline, wave-clear, and boss-focus roles before each checkpoint.

entries.title: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Revive Management
entries.description: Protect revive windows and rotate defensive tools so one downed player does not become a full-team collapse.

entries.title: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Duplicate Hero Strategy
entries.description: Duplicate hero picks can be highly effective when loadouts are specialized for wave control and boss execution.

lucidBlocksCrashFixAndTroubleshooting.title: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Patch Notes and Trailer
lucidBlocksCrashFixAndTroubleshooting.intro: Track official Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt updates through patch notes and trailer drops so your builds and reward priorities stay current.

steps.description: Start with official patch announcements to confirm event timing, mode changes, and reward updates.

questions.question: Is Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt a standalone game?
questions.answer: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt is a limited-time PvE event mode inside Marvel Rivals, not a standalone game.

questions.question: When does Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt end?
questions.answer: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt is scheduled to end on July 30, 2026 at 09:00 UTC.

questions.question: How many players can join Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt?
questions.answer: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt supports solo play and 1-4 player co-op squads.

questions.question: What rewards are in Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt?
questions.answer: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt rewards include Units, Unstable Molecules, titles, moods, gallery cards, emoji, sprays, and Kingpin accessory shards.

questions.question: Which heroes are available in Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt?
questions.answer: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt features Blade, Jeff the Land Shark, Moon Knight, The Punisher, Squirrel Girl, and Thor.

questions.question: How do I unlock the Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Kingpin route?
questions.answer: Marvel Rivals Blood Hunt Kingpin route opens by completing the hidden objective chain across required event phases.
